validation_smoke.name: hardware.cpu-arch L3 validation smoke
signals: perf counter shows reduced cache misses (LLC/L1 miss rate)
branch-mispredict rate decreased under perf stat
IPC (instructions per cycle) improved on representative input
emitted assembly confirms vectorized loop body
false-sharing eliminated (per-core line ownership in cache report)

diagnosis_smoke.name: hardware.cpu-arch diagnosis smoke
signals: hot loop with strided/random memory access thrashing cache
shared counter on one cache line written by multiple threads
data-dependent branch in inner loop with high mispredict rate
scalar loop the compiler refused to vectorize
cross-socket memory access on a NUMA machine
